mapper.select: SELECT ADM_ID FROM WH_ADMIN WHERE ADM_ID = #{ADM_ID} AND ADM_PWD = CONCAT('*',UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{ADM_PWD}))))) AND ADM_USE_YN = '1'

SELECT M.MEM_ID,
(SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE APP_ID = M.APP_ID) PRS_NAME,
MEM_TYPE, MEM_NAME, MEM_STAR, MEM_STAR_CHG, IF(MEM_AGREEMENT = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS MEM_AGREEMENT, IF(MEM_USE_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS MEM_USE_YN ,IFNULL(PRICE,0) PRICE ,IFNULL(PRICE_CHG,0) PRICE_CHG ,IFNULL(HEART,0) HEART ,IFNULL(HEART_CHG,0) HEART_CHG ,MEM_CREATE_DATE ,IFNULL(CONTENT_CNT,0) CONTENT_CNT FROM WH_MEMBER M LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_PRICE) PRICE , SUM(A.CON_PRICE_CHG) PRICE_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_PRICE A ,WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) A ON (M.MEM_ID = A.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT WM.MEM_ID, COUNT(*) CONTENT_CNT FROM WH_CONTENT WC, WH_MEMBER WM WHERE 1=1 AND WC.PRS_ID = WM.MEM_ID GROUP BY WM.MEM_ID ) B ON (M.MEM_ID = B.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_HEART) HEART, SUM(A.CON_HEART_CHG) HEART_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_HEART A, WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) C ON (M.MEM_ID = C.MEM_ID) WHERE 1=1
AND MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND M.APP_ID = #{APP_ID}
ORDER BY MEM_CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT PRS_ID ,PRS_PWD ,PRS_NAME ,PRS_EMAIL ,PRS_HOMEPAGE ,PRS_USE_YN ,PRS_TYPE ,PRS_AUTH ,PRS_AUTH_YN ,(SELECT IF(SUM(CON_PRICE) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE)) FROM WH_PRICE WHERE PRS_ID = M.PRS_ID ) AS PRICE ,(SELECT IF(SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG)) FROM WH_PRICE WHERE PRS_ID = M.PRS_ID ) AS PRICE_CHG ,(SELECT IF(SUM(CON_HEART) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART)) FROM WH_HEART WHERE PRS_ID = M.PRS_ID ) AS HEART ,(SELECT IF(SUM(CON_HEART_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART_CHG)) FROM WH_HEART WHERE PRS_ID = M.PRS_ID ) AS HEART_CHG FROM WH_PRESS M WHERE 1=1 AND PRS_TYPE = #{PRS_TYPE} ORDER BY PRS_CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT PRS_ID ,PRS_NAME ,PRS_EMAIL ,PRS_HOMEPAGE ,PRS_USE_YN ,PRS_TYPE ,PRS_AUTH ,PRS_AUTH_YN , (CASE WHEN PRS_TYPE = '1' THEN'언론사' WHEN PRS_TYPE ='2' THEN '학원/출판' ELSE '기업/단체' END) PRS_TYPE_NM ,APP_APPLY_YN ,APP_ISSUED_YN ,APP_AUTH_KEY ,ORIG_FILE_NM ,STORED_FILE_NM FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1 AND PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET PRS_EMAIL = IFNULL(#{PRS_EMAIL}, PRS_EMAIL), APP_APPLY_YN = 'Y' WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
UPDATE WH_PRESS SET APP_ISSUED_YN = 'Y', PRS_AUTH = 'CM', APP_AUTH_KEY = #{APP_AUTH_KEY} WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(PRS_ID) + 1 AS PRS_ID FROM WH_PRESS
SELECT * FROM WH_PRICE WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} ORDER BY PRI_CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT * FROM WH_HEART WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} ORDER BY HRT_CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT WC.CON_ID ,WC.CON_TITLE ,WC.CON_PRICE ,IF(WC.CON_USE_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS CON_USE_YN ,IF(WC.CON_META_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS CON_META_YN ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) AS CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_COMMENT WCM WHERE WCM.CON_ID = WC.CON_ID AND COM_USE_YN = 1) AS CMT_CNT ,WC.CON_BODY ,PRS_ID
,(SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE APP_ID = WC.APP_ID) PRS_NAME
,(SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = WC.PRS_ID) REG_NAME
,(SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = WC.PRS_ID) REG_NAME
FROM WH_CONTENT WC WHERE 1=1 AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE}
AND WC.APP_ID = #{APP_ID}
) M WHERE 1=1
AND CON_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND (CON_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR CON_BODY LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
AND PRS_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND REG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WC.CON_ID ,WC.CON_TITLE ,WC.CON_PRICE ,IF(WC.CON_USE_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS CON_USE_YN ,IF(WC.CON_META_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS CON_META_YN ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_CONT_CNT WCC WHERE WCC.CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) AS CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_COMMENT WCM WHERE WCM.CON_ID = WC.CON_ID AND COM_USE_YN = 1) AS CMT_CNT ,WC.CON_BODY ,PRS_ID
,(SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE APP_ID = WC.APP_ID) PRS_NAME
,(SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = WC.PRS_ID) REG_NAME
,(SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = WC.PRS_ID) REG_NAME
,WC.CON_PRIOT ,IF(WC.CON_TOP_YN = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS CON_TOP_YN ,WC.CON_TOP_DATE ,(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CON_HEART),0) FROM WH_HEART WHERE CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) HEART ,(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CON_HEART_CHG),0) FROM WH_HEART WHERE CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) HEART_CHG ,(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CON_PRICE),0) FROM WH_PRICE WHERE CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) PRICE ,(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG),0) FROM WH_PRICE WHERE CON_ID = WC.CON_ID) PRICE_CHG ,DATE_FORMAT(WC.CON_CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') CON_CREATE_DATE ,CON_UPDATE_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT WC WHERE 1=1 AND CON_TYPE = #{CON_TYPE}
AND WC.APP_ID = #{APP_ID}
) M WHERE 1=1
AND CON_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND (CON_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR CON_BODY LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
AND PRS_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND REG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
ORDER BY CON_PRIOT DESC
SELECT CATEGORY_TAG FROM WH_PRESS WHERE APP_ID=#{APP_ID}

SELECT WC.CON_ID, WC.APP_ID, WC.PRS_ID, (SELECT PRS_NAME FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = WC.PRS_ID) PRS_NAME, CON_TITLE, CON_SUBTITLE, CON_THUMNAIL, CON_VIDEO, CON_VIDEO_THUMNAIL, CON_ORIGIN_URL, CON_YOUTUBE_URL, CON_BODY, CON_PREFIX, CON_PRICE, CON_META_YN, CON_USE_YN, CON_TYPE, CON_CATEGORY, CON_TOP_YN, CON_TOP_DATE FROM WH_CONTENT WC WHERE 1=1 AND CON_ID = #{CON_ID}

SELECT WC.CON_ID, WC.COM_ID, WC.MEM_ID, WC.COM_BODY, WC.COM_USE_YN, WC.COM_CREATE_DATE, WM.MEM_NAME FROM WH_COMMENT WC, WH_MEMBER WM WHERE WC.MEM_ID = WM.MEM_ID AND CON_ID = #{CON_ID} ORDER BY COM_CREATE_DATE ASC
SELECT * FROM WH_IMAGE WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} ORDER BY IMG_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_IMAGE (CON_ID, IMG_ID, IMG_URL, IMG_ORIGIN_URL, IMG_USE_YN) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, ${IMG_ID}, #{IMG_URL}, #{IMG_ORIGIN_URL}, ${IMG_USE_YN})
mapper.select: SELECT STR_URL FROM WH_STORE WHERE STR_TYPE = #{type}

SELECT * FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1
AND PRS_AUTH_YN = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PRS_CREATE_DATE ASC

SELECT IF(SUM(CON_PRICE) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE)) AS PRICE, IF(SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG)) AS PRICE_CHG FROM WH_PRICE WHERE CON_ID IN (SELECT CON_ID FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE PRS_ID = #{prsId})

SELECT IF(SUM(CON_HEART) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART)) AS HEART, IF(SUM(CON_HEART_CHG) IS NULL, 0, SUM(CON_HEART_CHG)) AS HEART_CHG FROM WH_HEART WHERE CON_ID IN (SELECT CON_ID FROM WH_CONTENT WHERE PRS_ID = #{prsId})

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WH_EVENT EVT WHERE 1=1
AND APP_ID = #{APP_ID}
SELECT EVT_ID, APP_ID, (SELECT PRS_ID FROM WH_PRESS WHERE APP_ID = M.APP_ID) PRS_ID, EVT_TEXT, EVT_BTN_TEXT, EVT_STAR, EVT_URL, EVT_CHG_YN, EVT_USE_YN FROM WH_EVENT M WHERE EVT_ID = #{EVT_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_EVENT SET EVT_TEXT = #{EVT_TEXT}, EVT_BTN_TEXT = #{EVT_BTN_TEXT}, EVT_STAR = #{EVT_STAR}, EVT_URL = #{EVT_URL}, EVT_CHG_YN = #{EVT_CHG_YN}, EVT_USE_YN = #{EVT_USE_YN} WHERE EVT_ID = #{EVT_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(EVT_ID) + 1 AS EVT_ID FROM WH_EVENT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_EVENT (EVT_ID, APP_ID, EVT_TEXT, EVT_BTN_TEXT, EVT_STAR, EVT_URL, EVT_CHG_YN, EVT_USE_YN) VALUES (#{EVT_ID}, #{APP_ID}, #{EVT_TEXT}, #{EVT_BTN_TEXT}, #{EVT_STAR}, #{EVT_URL}, #{EVT_CHG_YN}, #{EVT_USE_YN})
INSERT INTO WH_IMAGE (CON_ID, IMG_ID, IMG_URL, IMG_ORIGIN_URL, IMG_USE_YN) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{IMG_ID}, '', '', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1 AND APP_ISSUED_YN = 'Y' AND PRS_AUTH_YN = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PRS_CREATE_DATE ASC
SELECT * FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1 AND APP_APPLY_YN = 'Y' AND PRS_AUTH_YN = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT A.APP_ID ,PRS_NAME ,COUNT(MEM_ID) CNT FROM WH_PRESS A LEFT JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON (A.APP_ID = M.APP_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND A.APP_ID = #{APP_ID} GROUP BY A.APP_ID ,PRS_NAME

SELECT M.PRS_ID ,PRS_NAME ,IFNULL(SUM(CON_PRICE),0) CON_PRICE ,IFNULL(SUM(CON_PRICE_CHG),0) CON_PRICE_CHG FROM WH_PRICE M, WH_PRESS A WHERE 1=1 AND M.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID AND A.APP_ID = #{APP_ID} GROUP BY M.PRS_ID ,PRS_NAME

SELECT M.PRS_ID ,PRS_NAME ,IFNULL(SUM(CON_HEART),0) CON_HEART ,IFNULL(SUM(CON_HEART_CHG),0) CON_HEART_CHG FROM WH_HEART M, WH_PRESS A WHERE 1=1 AND M.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID AND A.APP_ID = #{APP_ID} GROUP BY M.PRS_ID ,PRS_NAME
